title: en idhayam Ithuvarai lyrics singam Song lyrics
stanzas:
Song: En Idhayam
Singer: Suchithra Karthik Kumar, Tipu

En Idhayam Ithuvarai Thudithathillai
Ippo Thudikkirathey
En Manasu Ithuvari Paranthathillai
Ippo Parakirathey
Ithu Ethanaal Ethanaal Theriyavillai
Athanaal Pidikirathey
Ithu Sugama Valiya Puriyavillai
Konjam Sugamum Konjam Valiyum Sernthu Thurathukirathey

Kootathil Ninraalum Unnaiyae Thaeduthu Kangal
Ottraiyai Poanaalum Unnudan Nadakkuthu Kaalgal
Achamae Illatha Paechilae Mayanguthu Nenjam
Michamae Illamal Unnidam Vanthathaen Thanjam
Dhavani Mothiyae Sayudhey Theredi
Rendadi Naaladi Nooru Adi Izhuthai

En Idhayam… Idhayam Idhayam Idhayam Idhayam…
En Idhayam Ithuvarai Thudikkavillai ...

Unnidam Eppothum Urimaiyai Palagida Vaendum
Vairamae Aanalum Thinam Thinam Tholaithida Thoondum
Ithuvarai En Nenjil Illavae Illai Payangal
Irandu Naal Paarthaenae Miratuthey Unthan Kunangal
Ithanai Naatkalai Paduthathum Uranginaen…(mg.com)
Irandu Naal Kaanvilae Unnai Kandu Vizhithaen

En Idhayam… En Idhayam…
En Idhayam Ithuvarai Thudikkavillai ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song En Idhayam Ithuvarai expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the inner feelings of the characters in the movie.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Singam, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Suchitra and Tipu, who bring the lyrics to life with their soulful rendition.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for En Idhayam Ithuvarai was composed by Devi Sri Prasad, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was this song released?

This beautiful track was released on May 17, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Singam, the song En Idhayam Ithuvarai serves as a poignant expression of love and yearning. The lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of the characters, encapsulating their struggles and desires. With a soothing melody composed by Devi Sri Prasad, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This duet by Suchitra and Tipu adds depth to the narrative, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of En Idhayam Ithuvarai from the blockbuster Singam, where the melodious voices of Suchitra and Tipu blend seamlessly with Devi Sri Prasad's captivating composition. This romantic duet captures the essence of love and longing, making it a timeless favorite. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics that resonate with anyone who's ever experienced the beauty of love.
stanzaMeanings: My heart has not started beating until now, but now it is starting. My mind has not flown until now, but now it is soaring. I do not know how much this is, so I am holding on to it. This is not completely clear, just a little comfort and a little pain are mixing together.
My heart has not started beating...

Even if you are in a crowd, I search for you. Even if my eyes are closed, I walk with you. My feet are not afraid, my heart is not confused. I came to you without any hesitation. The sound of your name echoes in my heart, and I write a hundred beats for you.
My heart... Heart, heart, heart, heart... My heart has not started beating...

With you, I always want to share my rights. But every day, I lose a little bit of it. Until now, there has been nothing in my heart. I saw you for two days and was amazed. I have been awake for these many days, thinking of you... I have not seen you for two days, but I woke up seeing you.
My heart... My heart... My heart has not started beating...
